title: Take Me With You
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on take me with you within the Take Me With You storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: On top of saving us, they're even looking out for us!! Thank youu!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Are you Frickin' kidding, Neko- Manushi ..?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I suppose we adults just have to stay firm and alert!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Yes... After all, we can't allow...

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: The Samurai to enter this country!!!

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.text: The person they're all looking for, Raizo, can't be found anywhere! There's not even any reason for him to come here....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...besides, that was the entire cause of this empire that had prospered for over a thousand years coming to ruin!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: No matter how grateful they are to their saviors... for a samural to be among their crew...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: We can't let them find out, no matter what it takes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: If by chance... they discovered that Kinemon had chosen this place as his rendzevous point...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Even the ever cheerful and merry milk tribe would absolutely lose it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'm in no mood to fight those guys at this point!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: We'll stand watch here until morning and stop Kinemon and Kan- Juurou...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: It's still in the dim hours before the dawn breaks...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Indeed we have made our destination at last-!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: My, my, we were indeed met with much misfortune, but alas, we have succeeded!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I'm sure Luffy and the others have been worried!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: It was bad of us to keep them waiting, I'm sure they've grown weary by now!!

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.text: But Sir ate... you still haven't really told us anything. I'm simply searching for a warrior known as "Raizo"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: ....!! I... I don't know anything about anything de Gosaru!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: This is huge trouble de Gosaru! Samu- Rais Degosaru!!! I have to hurry and report this....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: A frantic desperate state of emergency ?!!

summary: Take Me With You: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
